description: Style NoteTonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a deep scoop neckline, this Cream-coloured top has sleeveless styling, pearls and crystal embellishments on the straps, pleated from the neckline down, designed with a loose cut hemMaterial and CareShell 95% rayon and 5% spandex with a lining of 100% polyesterHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
